programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: (M) The team uncovers a potential Bigfoot kill zone directly above Lake Fear. They launch a squadron of patrol drones to sweep the area for the existence of Sasquatch.

programme.title: Monsterquest
programme.sub-title: Special - Ep 6 Best of: Mystery of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want To Believe
programme.desc: (M) The Osbournes get the scoop on an extraterrestrial hookup, and Jack pushes his parents to believe in interdimensional green children.

programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.sub-title: It Came From the Woods and The Lakehouse
